THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RENT A CENTER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEE, LORIA $1,525.08 PRINCIPAL, $131.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,656.08, DEFENDANT FAILED TO APPEAR. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
